name: Sanguine Mutants
author: Bloodbat
description: A collection of modules based on Mutable Instruments Eurorack devices and their variants.

modules.name: Funes
modules.description: Powerful, polyphonic macro oscillator based on Mutable Instruments' Plaits 1.2 [27HP]

modules.name: Sanguine Mutants Blank
modules.description: Rack sleekerizer: add the Mutants goblin and a glowing Mutants logo to your rack! [10HP]

modules.name: Apices
modules.description: Versatile complement to any patch, based on Mutable Instruments' Peaks [22HP]

modules.name: Aleae
modules.description: Pair of polyphonic Bernoully gates based on Mutable Instruments' Branches [6HP]

modules.name: Nodi
modules.description: Adaptable, polyphonic macro oscillator based on Mutable Instruments' Braids [28HP]

modules.name: Contextus
modules.description: Multipurpose, polyphonic macro oscillator based on the Renaissance alternative firmware for Mutable Instruments' Braids [28HP]

modules.name: Nebulae
modules.description: Polyphonic texture synthesizer based on the Monsoon version of Mutable Instruments' Clouds [27HP]

modules.name: Etesia
modules.description: Polyphonic texture synthesizer based on the Parasite firmware for Mutable Instruments' Clouds [27HP]

modules.name: Mortuus
modules.description: All-around gap filler based on the Dead Man's Catch firmware, with some additions, for Mutable Instruments' Peaks [22HP]

modules.name: Fluctus
modules.description: Polyphonic texture synthesizer based on the Kammerl Beat-Repeat firmware for Mutable Instruments' Clouds [27HP]
modules.keywords: Clouds Beat-repeat Beat Repeat Monsoon beatrepeat

modules.name: Incurvationes
modules.description: Polyphonic meta modulator based on Mutable Instruments' Warps [10HP]

modules.name: Distortiones
modules.description: Doctored, flexible and fully polyphonic meta-modulator based on the Parasite alternative firmware for Mutable Instruments' Warps [10HP]

modules.name: Mutuus
modules.description: Experimental, polyphonic and multifaceted meta-modulator based on the Symbiote firmware for Mutable Instruments' Warps [10HP]

modules.name: Explorator
modules.description: Polyphonic multiple, mixer, noise source, sample and hold, inverter, rectifier and logic unit, based on Mutable Instruments' Links and Kinks [10HP]

modules.name: Marmora
modules.description: Random sampler based on Mutable Instruments' Marbles [28HP]

modules.name: Anuli
modules.description: Polyphonic resonator based on Mutable Instruments' Rings [21HP]
modules.keywords: Rings Modal Resonator Organ String Machine

modules.name: Velamina
modules.description: Tetrad of polyphonic voltage controller amplifiers based on the revised Veils from Mutable Instruments [10HP]

modules.name: Aestus
modules.description: Polyphonic modulator based on Mutable Instruments' Tides [14HP]

modules.name: Temulenti
modules.description: Multifaceted, polyphonic modulator based on the Parasite firmware for Mutable Instruments' Tides [14HP]

modules.name: Vimina
modules.description: Polyphonic dual clock divider, multiplier and swinger based on the Twigs firmware for Mutable Instruments' Branches [6HP]

modules.name: Nix
modules.description: Expander for Apices: adds CV modulation to function knobs [9HP]

modules.name: Ansa
modules.description: Expander for Mortuus: adds CV modulation to function knobs [9HP]
modules.keywords: Peaks CV Voltage Control Dead Man Catch Rainier

modules.name: Scalaria
modules.description: Polyphonic Moog inspired low-pass ladder filter from the original Symbiote firmware for Mutable Instruments' Warps [9HP]

modules.name: Reticula
modules.description: Topographic drum sequencer based on Mutable Instruments' Grids [16HP]

modules.name: Funes Mk2
modules.description: Remixed polyphonic macro oscillator based on Mutable Instruments' Plaits 1.2 with more polyphonic capabilities and all of Funes' power with a smaller footprint [17HP]
